resultList.dtldesc: Embrace comfortable living with this 3 BHK residential house for sale in Prakash Nagar, Hyderabad. Situated in a well-established neighborhood, this home offers a peaceful environment with excellent connectivity to daily essentials. Property Specifications This well-maintained 3 BHK residential house in Prakash Nagar offers a comfortable and practical living space in a peaceful neighborhood. Spread across a land area of 1350 sqft with a carpet area of 1150 sqft, this ready-to-move-in home is located on the ground floor and is ideal for families seeking functionality and convenience. The house is semi-furnished with lights, fans, and wardrobes in all bedrooms. The layout includes three spacious bedrooms, two common bathroomsone with Indian fittings and one with western fittingsa well-ventilated living room, a separate dining room, a store room, and a standard kitchen with an attached utility area. The flooring is finished with mosaic, adding a touch of old-world charm, while the design follows Vaastu principles and is north-facing, ensuring balance and positive energy throughout the home. This property is perfect for families looking for a ready residence in a central and accessible part of Hyderabad. Facilities The house comes with ample open parking space, providing convenience for residents and guests. A reliable 24-hour water supply is available from both borewell and municipal sources, ensuring uninterrupted access to water for daily use. Locality Located just behind the old sub-registrar office and 200 meters from Mahavir Palm Grove, this property enjoys a prime location in Prakash Nagar, Hyderabad. The area is well-supported by essential infrastructure, with schools, malls, supermarkets, banks, and ATMs all in close proximity. Hospitals are just 400 meters away, offering quick access to healthcare services. Public transport is easily available with frequent buses and auto-rickshaws, while Sulurpeta and Prakash Nagar Metro Stations are just 200 meters away, enhancing connectivity. The old Begumpet Airport is also within 500 meters, making this a highly accessible and convenient residential area.

Banks and ATMs are also located nearby, adding to the overall convenience.This property is an excellent investment for those seeking a spacious and secure home in one of Hyderabads most vibrant and well-connected areas. Dont miss this opportunity to create your dream living space.
